title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXVI. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Little Tom Dandy
            Was my first suitor,
        He had a spoon and dish,
            And a little pewter.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXVI. Love And Matrimony." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
